source: Phase 0 passing runs, median per-call values. alignment_threshold=0.5 (binary check: does reasoning mention target file?). deliberation_threshold_tokens=29 (median per-call token count, passing runs, n=503 calls). deliberation_threshold_chars=117 (median per-call char count, passing runs). Passing run means: alignment=0.1883 vs failing=0.0480 (4x). Deliberation: median per-call=29 tokens (passing) vs 28 (failing); effect is stronger at run level.
